@ui.alertDialog.defaultButton.description: Default label for the single dismiss button in a generic alert dialog, used when the caller passes no custom button text. A confirmation/acknowledgement, like the standard OK button.

@ui.modalDialog.close.description: aria-label for the small × close button in the top-right corner of any modal dialog. Screen-reader-only; the visible glyph is ×.

@ui.popover.defaultAriaLabel.description: Default aria-label naming a popover region when the caller passes none. Generic fallback meaning a small floating panel of choices.

@ui.select.placeholder.description: Default placeholder shown in a dropdown (select) trigger before the user has picked an option.

ui.combobox.emptyText: No matches. Keep typing to use your own value.

@ui.combobox.emptyText.description: Shown in a combobox (text field with suggestions) popup when nothing matches what the user typed. Reassures them they can still enter a custom value that isn't in the suggestion list.

@ui.combobox.loadingSuggestions.description: aria-label for the in-field loading spinner while a combobox fetches its suggestion list.

@ui.combobox.showSuggestions.description: aria-label for the chevron button that opens a combobox's suggestion dropdown.

@ui.commandBox.copyAria.description: aria-label for the copy button next to a shown terminal command. Copies the command text to the clipboard.

@ui.commandBox.copy.description: Resting label of the copy button next to a shown terminal command. Tight button; keep short.

@ui.commandBox.copied.description: Brief confirmation shown on the copy button right after the command was copied, replacing the word Copy for a couple of seconds. Tight button; keep short.

@ui.shortcutChip.customizeAria.description: aria-label for a clickable keyboard-shortcut pill that opens shortcut customization for one command.

placeholders.commandName: the name of the command whose shortcut this pill shows (for example Copy, Rename)

@ui.shortcutChip.customizeTooltip.description: Tooltip on hovering a clickable keyboard-shortcut pill, hinting that clicking it opens shortcut customization.

@ui.toast.sendErrorReport.description: Button on an error toast that opens the error-report flow. Ends with an ellipsis to signal a follow-up dialog opens.

@ui.toast.dismissAria.description: aria-label for the × button that closes (dismisses) a toast notification.

ui.loadingIcon.finalizing: All {countText} {count, plural, one {file} other {files}} loaded. Sorting your files, preparing view...

@ui.loadingIcon.finalizing.description: Loading message shown after all entries arrive, while the list is being sorted and laid out. Appears centered in a pane during a slow directory open.

placeholders.countText: how many files, already formatted for display (for example 1,234)
placeholders.count: the same number of files (drives the singular/plural form of the noun)

@ui.loadingIcon.loaded.description: Progress message shown while a directory is still loading, reporting how many entries have arrived so far. Appears centered in a pane.

placeholders.countText: how many files have loaded so far, already formatted for display (for example 1,234)
placeholders.count: the same number of files (drives the singular/plural form of the noun)

@ui.loadingIcon.openingFolder.description: Loading message shown briefly while a folder is being opened, before its entries start arriving.

@ui.loadingIcon.loading.description: Generic loading message shown centered in a pane while content is being fetched.

ui.loadingIcon.cancelHint: Press <key></key> to cancel and go back

@ui.loadingIcon.cancelHint.description: Hint under the loading spinner telling the user how to abort a slow load. The empty <key></key> tag is where the app inserts a keyboard-key pill showing the Escape key (a styled chip); keep the tag, it has no text of its own.

placeholders.key: position of the inline Esc key pill (a styled chip the app fills in); keep the empty wrapper tag
